name: xdm_resume_integrity_recovery_overlay
description: Adds transactional partial files, durable resume checkpoints, server identity validation, checksum verification, mirror and Metalink support, crash recovery, and Verify/Repair UX.
commitMessage: Add durable resume integrity and crash recovery
constraints: Apply on top of commit d9c9756
Require zero warnings and zero errors
Preserve existing HTTP, FTP, queue, scheduler, browser capture, media and aria2 behavior
Preserve legacy partial and finalization migration
Do not trust orphaned single-stream partial data without a compatible durable checkpoint
Migrate legacy segmented parts only through the probed range-validation path
Do not finalize data that fails expected size or checksum validation
